## AAPL News, from 2026-05-27 to 2026-06-03:

### Apple Suppliers Signal Solid Handset Demand Into Summer Quarter (source: Reuters)
Component orders across the Asian supply chain point to steady iPhone build plans, easing concerns about a post-holiday air pocket in demand.
Link: https://finance.yahoo.com/news/apple-suppliers-signal-solid-handset-demand-1.html

### Services Growth Keeps Apple Margin Story Intact, Analysts Say (source: Bloomberg)
Subscription revenue continues to outgrow hardware, supporting gross-margin expansion even as device pricing stays flat year over year.
Link: https://finance.yahoo.com/news/services-growth-keeps-apple-margin-story-2.html

### Regulators Open New Inquiry Into App Store Payment Rules (source: Financial Times)
The inquiry revisits commission structures on in-app purchases; Apple says existing remedies already address the concerns raised.
Link: https://finance.yahoo.com/news/regulators-open-new-inquiry-app-store-3.html
